narrative_arc: A high-stakes chase through the neon-drenched streets of Neo-Mumbai as a rogue tech-wizard flees from a corporate security drone.
art_style: Futuristic Cyberpunk Noir with high-contrast shadows and glowing neon highlights (Pink, Cyan, and Deep Purple).
lettering_style: Digital-glitch style balloons with sharp, clean sans-serif text; sound effects in bold, glowing block letters.

comic_panels.characters: Arjun (rogue wizard, mid-20s, Indian features, glowing cyber-hand, wearing a tech-worn trench coat) sprinting across a rainy rooftop.
comic_panels.action: Arjun leaps from one building ledge to another, rain splashing around his boots.
comic_panels.background: The dense skyline of Neo-Mumbai, packed with holographic ads and flying traffic; a security drone looms in the upper corner.
comic_panels.dialogue: Almost there... just one more jump!

comic_panels.characters: Arjun landing hard on a metal catwalk, his cyber-hand sparking as it hits the surface for balance; teeth grit in determination.
comic_panels.action: Landing sequence; sparks flying; eyes narrowed and glowing with blue data-streams.
comic_panels.background: Cables and conduits lining the catwalk; steam rising from a nearby vent.

comic_panels.characters: The red glowing 'eye' of the corporate security drone, scanning the catwalk; Arjun's reflection visible in the lens.
comic_panels.action: The drone's searchlight sweeps across the frame, narrowly missing Arjun who is pressed against a dark alcove.
comic_panels.background: Distant neon blur of the city below.

comic_panels.characters: Arjun's cyber-hand as he punches a code into a glowing keypad hidden in the wall.
comic_panels.action: Final keystroke; the keypad turns greeen.
comic_panels.background: Grit and grime on the metallic wall texture.

negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted features, text (except dialogue bubbles), watermark, mismatched art style across panels
